event: three-host deploy — service_state witness family to all running instances
authorization: Operator explicit go (after-5pm gate met, ~6pm). Deploy followed the project_deployment playbook: per-host build (glibc), fail-closed, VM last (public blast radius).
deployed_commit: 72cb055 (origin/main HEAD); schema 58 -> 59 (migration 059 service_observations applied cleanly on every host)

hosts.sushi-k: canary. local build (glibc 2.39). old binaries preserved from /proc -> ~/nq/rollback/pre-servicestate-*; DB pre-migration backup. GREEN: active, dash 200, schema 59, boundaries 1/1/3, leak 0.
hosts.lil-nas-x: 192.168.69.10. scp sushi-k binaries (glibc match, no build). scp hit ETXTBSY on running binary -> fixed via scp-to-.new + mv. binaries+DB backed up .pre-servicestate-*. GREEN: active, dash 200, schema 59, boundaries 1/1/5, leak 0.
hosts.linode-vm: labelwatch -> nq.neutral.zone. ON-HOST build (glibc 2.35, 1m07s). rsync --exclude runs (real LAN receipts kept off public box; verified runs/ absent on VM). stop->backup(.pre-servicestate-*)->swap->start. GREEN: active, local dash 200, schema 59, boundaries 1/1/4, leak 0; PUBLIC https://nq.neutral.zone 200, boundaries present, leak 0 (both LAN subnets, dmz.spooky, proven-correct, neglected, P1 all 0).

verify_each: dashboard HTTP 200; render boundaries present (not an incident commander / not a proof checker / cannot testify); leak language 0; PRAGMA user_version 59; clean migration logs (applying version=59 -> complete version=59).
rollback_available: per host: pre-servicestate binaries (sushi-k from /proc; NAS+VM on-host cp) + nq.db.pre-servicestate-*.bak (pre-migration). Not needed — all GREEN.
state: all three running instances now on schema 59 / commit 72cb055. service_state observes real systemd services in production. origin == HEAD. Loop AUDIT/idle.
note: service_state live collector now active on all three: each host's systemd services write native state into service_observations every cycle.
